title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.1047 - Enrollment option plan standards for acceptance or rejection — notice of rejection, content
text:
162.1047.  Enrollment option plan standards for acceptance or rejection — notice of rejection, content. — The enrollment option plan shall include specific standards for the acceptance or rejection of student applications.  If an application is rejected, the district shall state in the notification the reason for the rejection.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1218 § 2 subsec. 1)
